backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing the core backend domain for ICSE Crowd, defining user profiles, posts, comments, chats, study groups, forums, reports, and friend requests with authorization and blob storage mixins. It manages in-memory state via maps, role-based access control, and utility comparators and ID generation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two frontend features that add a bottom inquiries/advertising contact section to the Home page with a mailto link and copy-to-clipboard UI. It lists affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of all major frontend files, outlining responsibilities such as routing, hooks, pages, components, theming, and backend integration. Acts as a high-level documentation snapshot of the frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration defining design tokens using the OKLCH color system for light and dark themes, including backgrounds, typography, charts, and sidebar styles. Applies base border and body styling across the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app that sets the page title to "ICSE Crowd" and mounts the application at the root div. Loads the Vite/ESM main.tsx script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication state, page navigation, conditional rendering of pages, profile setup modal, header/footer layout, and theme provider integration.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright information, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and developer credit with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Responsive navigation header with branding, page navigation, authentication controls, user menu, and conditional admin moderation access. Integrates Internet Identity login and React Query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog prompting first-time authenticated users to create a profile with name, email, and academic details. Submits data via a mutation hook and shows success or error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches a backend canister actor using the current Internet Identity. It initializes access control, supports anonymous access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Defines a React context, provider, and hook to manage Internet Identity authentication using Dfinity AuthClient, exposing login/logout, identity state, and derived login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a collection of React Query hooks that wrap backend actor calls for user profiles, feed posts, comments, likes, friendships, messaging, and other mutations with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind CSS layers and defines extensive CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors, layout tokens, and base styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app by rendering App with React Query and Internet Identity providers and importing global styles.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Implements a chat UI that lists users, allows selecting a contact, and sends messages using backend hooks with basic validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Implements a social feed page with post creation, file uploads, likes, and comments, integrating Internet Identity and backend hooks with client-side previews and progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/ForumPage.tsx: Implements a Q&A forum page that allows users to create new forum posts via a dialog and displays an empty-state UI when no questions exist.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component that markets the platform features, shows a hero section, and triggers Internet Identity login for unauthenticated users. Includes feature cards, background imagery, and a utility to copy a contact email with toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationPage.tsx: Admin moderation dashboard that fetches reports and users, displays report statistics, and allows reviewing or resolving reports and deleting posts. Uses tabs, tables, and status badges to manage report workflows.
frontend/src/pages/StudyGroupsPage.tsx: Page for managing study groups that allows users to create new groups via a dialog form and mutation hook. Shows an empty-state UI prompting users to create their first group.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL parameters from query strings or hash routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and clearing sensitive values from the URL. Used primarily for handling tokens and session-scoped parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, color tokens via CSS variables, container settings, animations, and plugins. Enables dark mode via class and includes typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata and evolving state description summarizing the ICSE Crowd dapp architecture, features, and versions. Acts as a canonical overview of implemented frontend and backend capabilities.
